characters.name: open/close all folders
characters.description: A man who is wheelchair-bound and is looked after by his friend Lou. But he's not actually paralyzed at all, and secretly gets out of his chair whenever Lou's back is turned. Acrofatic: Despite being obese, he's capable of surprising acts of athleticism... when Lou isn't looking, of course. The Ace: ARunning Gagis him often surpassing Lou at athletic activies Catchphrase: "I want that one", "Yeah, I know", and "I don't like it". Disability as an Excuse for Jerkassery: Subverted because he's faking it.

characters.name: Characters played by David Walliams
characters.description: Captain Oblivious: Throughout the entire series, he never learns that Andy is faking his disability. Catchphrase: "But I thought you said you love/hate (insert topic). You always said that (explains why Andy loves or hates that thing in the most detailed way.)", "Because once I (explain the thing Andy wants him to do and says he can't undo it)and that'll be a right kerfuffle." and "What a kerfuffle."He seems to be fond of the word "kerfuffle" in general. He seems to be fond of the word "kerfuffle" in general. Nice Guy: He is almostinhumanlypatient with Andy and his constant demands and is generally friendly and polite to every stranger he comes across, even averycross policeman who arrested him for speeding.Extreme Doormat: He lets Andy walk all over him. Extreme Doormat: He lets Andy walk all over him.

characters.name: Other Characters
characters.description: The PM who has no idea Sebastian has a crush on him. No Celebrities Were Harmed: He starts out as a fairly generic politician character, but as the series goes on, he becomes more overtly patterned after then-PMTony Blair. Only Sane by Comparison: He's a fairly grounded character compared to Sebastian but still sleeps with many political aides throughout the show. The barmaid in the village of Llandewi Breffi, and Daffyd's best friend. The Reveal: She turns out to be a lesbian in the last episode of Season 2.
